name: Peppered Citrus Olives
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Green olives (mixed sizes, if desired)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the olives and place them in a glass or other nonreactive container.
2. Using a wooden mallet or the back of a wooden spoon, lightly bruise or crack the peppercorns. Add to the olives.
3. Cut the lemon into 12 or 15 pieces, removing the seeds. Add the lemon to the olives.
4. Rub the thyme sprigs between your hands over the bowl, dropping some leaves onto the olives. Add the thyme sprigs and olive oil.
5. Turn the olives to coat them with the mixture. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 24 hours, or up to 3 days before serving.
Yields 2 cups.
